channel.title: Comments on: Lazy Magnolia Indian Summer, Ep. 108
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
Thanks for doing these shows guys! I always look forward to the new episode every week!
Cheers to great beers! Marco
item.content:encoded:
Thanks for doing these shows guys! I always look forward to the new episode every week!

Cheers to great beers!
Marco
